mapper.select: /* chgRcptMapper.getSeqNum */ SELECT SQ_CHG_RCPT_MST.NEXTVAL AS seqNum FROM DUAL

/* chgRcptMapper.getInsrChangeHst */
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MSP_CHG_RCPT_MST A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.TSK_TP = 'INS' AND A.CLAUSE_INSURANCE_FLAG = 'Y' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_CHG_RCPT_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND TSK_TP = A.TSK_TP AND TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM'))
mapper.update:
/* chgRcptMapper.cancelInsrMember */
UPDATE MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST SET END_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , STAT_CD = 'C' , RMK = TO_CHAR(#{seqNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}) , RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND STAT_CD = 'A' AND SUBSTR(END_DTTM, 1, 8) >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND INSR_CD IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0246' AND USG_YN = 'Y' AND ETC2 = 'Y')
mapper.select: /* chgRcptMapper.getAtmOpenContract */ SELECT DISTINCT A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , A.SCAN_ID AS scanId FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO B , CMN_GRP_CD_MST C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND B.CNTPNT_CD = C.CD_VAL AND C.GRP_ID = 'RCP2048' AND C.USG_YN = 'Y'

/* chgRcptMapper.getSubInfoScanId */ SELECT A.SCAN_ID AS scanId , DECODE(B.SCAN_ID, NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS scanMstYn FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_MCP B WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.SCAN_ID = B.SCAN_ID(+)
mapper.insert: /* chgRcptMapper.insertEmvScanMst */ INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_MCP ( SCAN_ID , WORK_ID , AGENCY_ID , COMPANY_ID , CUST_NM , C_MEMO , SCAN_FILE_CNT , DOC_TITLE , DOC_STATUS , DEL_REASON , USE_YN , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , MDFY_DT , MDFY_PRSN_ID , ONLINE_YN , DOC_STAT , PROC_PRSN_ID , PROC_DTTM , PROC_STAT_CD ) SELECT #{scanId} , WORK_ID , AGENCY_ID , COMPANY_ID , CUST_NM , C_MEMO , SCAN_FILE_CNT , DOC_TITLE , DOC_STATUS , DEL_REASON , USE_YN , SYSDATE , RGST_PRSN_ID , MDFY_DT , MDFY_PRSN_ID , ONLINE_YN , DOC_STAT , PROC_PRSN_ID , PROC_DTTM , PROC_STAT_CD FROM EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = #{newScanId}

/* chgRcptMapper.inserEmvScanFile */ INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP ( FILE_ID , SCAN_ID , FILE_NUMBER , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , DOC_ID , MAIN_DOC_CD , USE_YN , ORIGIN_DIR , SAVE_DIR , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , MDFY_DT , MDFY_PRSN_ID , BANK_CD , BANK_CD_NO , CONTRACT_NUM ) SELECT FILE_ID , #{scanId} , NVL((SELECT MAX(FILE_NUMBER) + 1 FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId}), 0) AS FILE_NUMBER , FILE_SIZE , FILE_EXT , DOC_ID , MAIN_DOC_CD , USE_YN , ORIGIN_DIR , SAVE_DIR , RGST_DT , RGST_PRSN_ID , MDFY_DT , MDFY_PRSN_ID , BANK_CD , BANK_CD_NO , CONTRACT_NUM FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP A WHERE A.SCAN_ID = #{newScanId}
